name: pebble
desc: The open-source alternative to Minecraft: Java Edition, a complete block-survival game in about 45,000 lines of Swift + Metal. Zero dependencies, fully determi…
descFull: The open-source alternative to Minecraft: Java Edition, a complete block-survival game in about 45,000 lines of Swift + Metal. Zero dependencies, fully deterministic, singleplayer for now. Not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.
